name: Dreams and bubbles
short_description: It is a game that combines maze exploration and action shooting elements.
detailed_description:
It is a game that combines maze exploration and action shooting elements. The game adopts retro pixel style graphics and constructs a complex underground maze world, filled with monsters of various forms and extremely challenging challenges. Players manipulate the protagonist and use the AD key on the keyboard to control the character's flexible movement in the maze. The up arrow indicates the character to move forward courageously; Press the spacebar to launch firepower and eliminate monsters that come along the way.

The game features a diverse weapon system and rich sound design, with each shot accompanied by realistic striking sound effects, creating a tense and exciting combat atmosphere. In the depths of the maze, not only does it test the player's strategic layout and quick response ability, but it also requires wisdom and courage to uncover hidden secrets and ultimately become a true maze warrior.
